tech_news.description: Animal Crossing: New Horizons just released a version 3.0.2 update, and it includes a special item to celebrate the series' 25th anniversary.

tech_news.title: Google Messages is cooking up a feature Samsung Messages users will love - Android Authority
tech_news.description: Sad about Samsung Messages dying? Well, it looks like Google Messages is working on a feature Samsung fans have been eagerly waiting for.

tech_news.title: Blurry iPhone Text Picture Problem: Is There An Easy Solution I’m Missing? - One Mile at a Time
tech_news.description: I use my iPhone for all my pictures of airlines and hotels. It serves me well, with one major issue... is there something I'm missing?

tech_news.title: Google shoehorned Rust into Pixel 10 modem to make legacy code safer - Ars Technica
tech_news.description: Cellular modems are complex black boxes of legacy code, but Google is making them safer with Rust.

tech_news.title: YouTube viewers can now work together to stop ads from playing - Dexerto
tech_news.description: YouTube is letting viewers combat ads by banding together and engaging in chat to keep ads from playing.

tech_news.title: The color grading tool used by Hollywood now supports still photos – and it’s free - Digital Camera World
tech_news.description: DaVinci Resolve, a video editor popular for its color tools, now supports still photos to give photographers cinematic color tools – and aid hybrid creators

tech_news.title: Microsoft is officially killing its Outlook Lite app next month - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: Launched in 2022, Outlook Lite is a lightweight version of the regular Outlook app, designed for Android phones with limited storage and regions with slower internet connections. The app had already been scheduled for retirement.

tech_news.title: RAMageddon has come for Microsoft’s Surface Pro and Surface Laptop - The Verge
tech_news.description: Microsoft is raising prices across its Surface lineup, with the Surface Pro 11 and Surface Laptop 7 now costing $1,499 instead of their $999 starting price.
